title: What It Actually Looks Like to Lead First and Kneel First
caption:
What it actually looks like to lead first and kneel first.

Christ led by wrapping a towel around his waist and washing the feet of men who'd abandon him by morning. That's the picture. Not leading from above the room, but from the floor of it.

A godly man is first into the hard conversation. First to apologize, even when he's only half at fault. First to kneel for men who haven't earned it yet.

Anyone can lead from the back when it's safe. He's already standing in the cost before anyone asks him to.

Go first into what it costs. Let the following take care of itself.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #manofgod #servantleadership #humility
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
